'''sahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wrongly|wrongly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-h-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wrongly|wrongly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:sahate|sahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sahatesher|sahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sahatesherĂ«m|sahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sahatero|sahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sahateshĂ«|sahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sahateshĂ«m|sahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisahatero|gokisahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisahateshĂ«|gokisahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisahateshĂ«m|gokisahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosahankerom|gosahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosahankeshĂ«|gosahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosahankeshĂ«m|gosahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosahankeya|gosahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sahaterom|sahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sahatemu|sahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sahateya|sahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisahaterom|gokisahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisahatemu|gokisahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisahateya|gokisahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:sahahate|sahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sahahatesher|sahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sahahatesherĂ«m|sahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sahahatero|sahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sahahateshĂ«|sahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sahahateshĂ«m|sahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisahahatero|gokisahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisahahateshĂ«|gokisahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisahahateshĂ«m|gokisahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosahahankerom|gosahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosahahankeshĂ«|gosahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosahahankeshĂ«m|gosahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosahahankeya|gosahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sahahaterom|sahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sahahatemu|sahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sahahateya|sahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisahahaterom|gokisahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisahahatemu|gokisahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisahahateya|gokisahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠhĂŠte|sĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠhĂŠtesher|sĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠhĂŠtero|sĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠhĂŠtero|gokisĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠhĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠhĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠhĂŠterom|sĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠhĂŠtemu|sĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠhĂŠteya|sĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠhĂŠterom|gokisĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠhĂŠteya|gokisĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:safhafte|safhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safhaftesher|safhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safhaftesherĂ«m|safhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safhaftero|safhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safhafteshĂ«|safhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safhafteshĂ«m|safhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafhaftero|gokisafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafhafteshĂ«|gokisafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafhafteshĂ«m|gokisafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafhafnkerom|gosafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafhafnkeshĂ«|gosafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafhafnkeshĂ«m|gosafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafhafnkeya|gosafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safhafterom|safhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safhaftemu|safhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safhafteya|safhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafhafterom|gokisafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafhaftemu|gokisafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafhafteya|gokisafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
